headline: The Trade Desk (TTD): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: The Trade Desk has gotten torched over the last six months - since September 2025, its stock price has dropped 41.9% to $26.48 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Trade Desk's EMEA and APAC Push Strengthens International Growth
summary: TTD ramps up EMEA and APAC investments as international markets outpace North America, building momentum for a more diversified global ad revenue base.

raw.headline: Trade Desk's EMEA and APAC Push Strengthens International Growth

headline: Amazon to hike price of ad-free Prime Video tier by $2 a month
summary: Amazon is boosting the price of Prime Video to $4.99 a month in the U.S., from $2.99 per month for users who want to avoid ads.
